## Meeting Purpose

[Company All Hands to welcome new team members, celebrate promotions, discuss new customer acquisitions, and provide product development updates.](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [14 new deals closed this month, totaling over $2M in potential ARR](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [New agentic workflow system with 4 core agents (researcher, drafter, post-processor, internal linker) being rolled out](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Product roadmap focuses on Atlas improvements, CheckThat.ai development, and content inventory system](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Engineering team restructured into three lanes: Client Ops, AI-Info, and Atlas/CheckThat](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Topics

### New Team Members

  - [Four new team members introduced: Katya (Reno), Patricia (Rio), Liz (Austin), and Hassan (Pakistan)](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Diverse backgrounds and interests, adding to the company's global presence](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### Promotions and Celebrations

  - [Matt Hill promoted to Technical Managing Editor, praised for client management and documentation skills](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [Ada recognized for exceptional performance, described as a cornerstone of Grotex](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)

### New Customer Acquisitions

  - [14 deals closed this month, over $2M in potential ARR](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Notable new clients: u.com, Bubble, Loveable, BaseStand, LightSource](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Success attributed to community building and relationship development](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Product Development Updates

  - [Atlas improvements: Work-in-progress features include client pages, knowledge base, and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [CheckThat.ai: New product for AI visibility tracking, combining aspects of G2 and Crunchbase](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Content inventory system: Aims to replace Airtable, automate opportunity finding](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### New Agentic Workflow System

  - [Four core agents: researcher, drafter, post-processor, internal linker](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Designed to streamline content creation process and improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Customizable for different client needs (e.g., Lovable vs. Clerk)](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Ongoing refinement and optimization of the system](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)

### Engineering Team Structure

  - [Three lanes: Client Ops, AI-Info, and Atlas/CheckThat](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Focus on improving processes, documentation, and feature development](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Roll out new agentic workflow system to more clients](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=3350.0)
  - [Content managers to provide documentation on current processes for engineering team integration](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=3372.0)
  - [Continue development of Atlas features, CheckThat.ai, and content inventory system](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Implement new QA process for product features before rollout](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=3384.0)
  - [Establish on-call engineer for quick bug fixes](https://fathom.video/share/37D5d9HSYSx1HnnxaAJSEG7HrpXbfuCR?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)
